qa_pairs.question: What is the name and year of the competition for which these resources are available?
qa_pairs.answer: These resources are available for the Resource Allocation Competition 2026.

qa_pairs.question: How are resources organized in the clusters and cloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Resources in the clusters and in the cloud are organized by subsystems.

qa_pairs.question: What happens if there's a discrepancy between resources requested in the attached document and the online form?
qa_pairs.answer: In case of a discrepancy between resources requested in the document attached to your application and the online form, what is requested in the online form will prevail.

qa_pairs.question: What resources are available under the arbutus-compute-cloud subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: The arbutus-compute-cloud subsystem offers VCPU, VGPU, RAM, local ephemeral disk, volumes, snapshots, floating IPs, volume and snapshot storage, shared filesystem storage*, and object storage.

qa_pairs.question: Does the arbutus-compute-cloud subsystem offer backup storage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the arbutus-compute-cloud subsystem does not offer backup storage.

qa_pairs.question: What resources are available under the arbutus-persistent-cloud subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: The arbutus-persistent-cloud subsystem offers VCPU, VGPU, RAM, local ephemeral disk, volumes, snapshots, floating IPs, volume and snapshot storage, shared filesystem storage*, and object storage.

qa_pairs.question: Does the arbutus-persistent-cloud subsystem provide backup storage?
qa_pairs.answer: No, the arbutus-persistent-cloud subsystem does not provide backup storage.

qa_pairs.question: What type of storage is available in the arbutus-dcache subsystem?
qa_pairs.answer: The arbutus-dcache subsystem offers dCache storage.

qa_pairs.question: Is backup storage available for arbutus-dcache?
qa_pairs.answer: No, backup storage is not available for arbutus-dcache.

qa_pairs.question: Where should I go on the CCDB portal to request resources?
qa_pairs.answer: On the CCDB portal, you should go to the 'Resource Request' section of the corresponding Resources for Research Groups (RRG) or Research Platforms and Portals (RPP) online application form.

qa_pairs.question: What will the dropdown menu under 'New resource request' show?
qa_pairs.answer: The dropdown menu under 'New resource request' will show the list of all systems and subsystems with the corresponding resources available for allocation.

qa_pairs.question: How can I indicate that I don't have a preference for a particular system for my resource request?
qa_pairs.answer: To indicate that you do not have a preference for a particular system, you should check the option "I have to select a system but I don’t mind receiving an allocation on any other suitable one" in the 'Reason for selecting system' section.

qa_pairs.question: Which subsystem convention should I select for requesting CPU resources?
qa_pairs.answer: For requesting CPU resources, you should select a 'system-compute' subsystem, such as 'rorqual-compute'.

qa_pairs.question: What should I pay attention to when requesting CPU resources?
qa_pairs.answer: When requesting CPU resources, you should pay special attention to your memory requirements, as this will be taken into account for final allocations.

qa_pairs.question: Which subsystem convention should I use to request GPU resources?
qa_pairs.answer: To request GPU resources, you should use a 'system-gpu' subsystem, such as 'rorqual-gpu'.

qa_pairs.question: How do I request storage resources on a particular system?
qa_pairs.answer: To request storage resources on a particular system, you should select a 'system-storage' subsystem, such as 'rorqual-storage'.

qa_pairs.question: If I want to request both CPU and /project storage on the Rorqual cluster, how many requests do I need to submit?
qa_pairs.answer: If you want to request both CPU resources and /project storage resources on the Rorqual cluster, you will have to fill in two separate requests.

qa_pairs.question: What would be the two separate requests for CPU and /project storage on the Rorqual cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: You would fill in one request with the 'rorqual-compute' subsystem for core years and memory, and another one with the 'rorqual-storage' subsystem for /project storage (in TB).

qa_pairs.question: Is the shared filesystem storage backed up?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, the shared filesystem storage is backed up.
